allow: Bash(cd /c/Work/RnD/data-model-comparison/option-b/pbip && python build_reports.py && echo "--- reportExtensions.json ---" && cat raw_plus/report_raw_plus.Report/definition/reportExtensions.json)

PowerShell(winget install --id Microsoft.Sqlcmd --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; \(Get-Command sqlcmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($sqlcmd = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\sqlcmd.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $sqlcmd\)\) { $sqlcmd = \(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter sqlcmd.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName }; Write-Output "SQLCMD=$sqlcmd"; & $sqlcmd --version)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet" -Recurse -Filter sqlcmd.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Recurse -Filter sqlcmd.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
